name._value: [Construction Site B3] Shumi's Lost Sack of Cash

1._value: I ran into #p403# again at #m10003000#. A while ago, she got a favor from #p401# to get some #t4003000#s for him, only to have the sack of money fall down and lose everything in the process. I guess I can find the sack of money in the deep part of the subway station, the #bConstruction Site B3#k, again.

2._value: I found #p403#'s lost Money Sack in the #m10003000# subway. #p403# can now buy what #p401# asked for. I received mesos and some potions as a gift. I should go to #bConstruction Site B3#k in the subway to look for more stuff.

0._value: Whoa... I've been really waiting for you to come back! What? Did I lose money again? Yep... well, this time, it's really big... Someone I know asked me for a favor. He wants me to get him 100 #t4003000#s. He gave me the money to buy them all, so I put that sack of money in my pocket, carrying it with me. It was way too heavy, though, so I dropped it on the ground, only to have the bottom of the sack wear off and have a hole in the end. The money fell down because of it... Can you find it for me?

Thank you so much! Well, the person that asked for the favor is sitting waaaaaaay down there. His name is #p401#, and he worked hard for that money through backdoor dealings, and if he ever finds out that I lost that money, he'll go crazy on me. Don't be fooled by his appearance; he's got quite a temper... Argh... Pleeaassse help me! Please help me find the sack of money! You're the only one I can count on right now!

1._value: I think the sack of money was dropped at the subway #bConstruction Site B3#k. I tried to go there and retrieve it but there are even more weird devices all over the place this time around, so I did little more than take a look at it from the distance. This may be difficult even for you this time around. Anyway please please please get that sack of money for me. I believe in you...

0._value: You must be busy here and there, huh? But if you ever decide to change your mind, then please help me. I'm being serious here...

Hey, it's that sack of money I lost! Phew... It's all good now. I knew you'd find it... Seriously, you should become a professional at this... But hey... You didn't take any for yourself, right? Let me see... I'm not doubting your honesty, but I still have to count it... one... two... three... four... Hm, seems okay.

1._value: Thanks! Here's a reward for taking up my request.

0._value: I raised your EXP and Fame for helping me. I also gave you some mesos, so spend them well. Oh, and I threw in some good potions, too. Thanks again, and I'll let you know if I have any more troubles.

Still haven't found the sack of money that I lost? Without it, I don't know what he's going to do with me... you may find it at the #bConstruction Site B3 of #m10003000##k subway. Be careful, there is some weird equipment in there. I believe in you.
